overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a sunlit waterfront promenade beside a modern office building, transitioning into a covered underpass with dramatic lighting and neon signs. The sequence captures the golden hour atmosphere of Night City with ray-traced reflections on the water and detailed architectural shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit waterfront promenade with concrete sea barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beside a modern office building with water to the right

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera along the promenade, passing by at close range around the 6-second mark

entered.detail: row of rectangular concrete blocks separating the walkway from the harbor water
tall dark green glass building with horizontal architectural lines running alongside the path
calm water surface reflecting the golden hour sunlight
tall palm trees lining the distant waterfront horizon
parked yellow taxi cab near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit waterfront promenade in a futuristic city. The camera walks forward along a concrete path bordered by rectangular sea barriers on the right and a tall modern glass office building on the left. A pedestrian approaches and passes by as the camera continues along the water's edge with palm trees visible in the golden-hour haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath building overhang

events.description: turns left away from the waterfront and enters a covered walkway beneath the building structure
lighting shifts from bright direct sunlight to dramatic dappled shadows cast by the overhead concrete structure

agents.ego_description: turning left into the sheltered walkway beneath the building, transitioning from open waterfront to covered passage

entered.detail: underside of the building creating a covered walkway with geometric shadow patterns on the ground
orange metal railings lining the left edge of the walkway
cars parked in rows along the left side under the building overhang

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a dramatic covered walkway beneath the office building. The scene transitions from open waterfront to a sheltered corridor where sunlight filters through gaps in the overhead structure, creating striped shadow patterns on the concrete floor. Parked cars line the left side as the camera moves deeper under the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep underpass with neon signage and concrete architecture

events.description: passing glowing purple neon signs that cast colored light onto the concrete walls and floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass beneath the building complex, passing concrete pillars and neon signage

entered.detail: massive rectangular concrete columns supporting the overhead building structure
glowing purple neon sign mounted on the left wall casting colored illumination
raised concrete platform with steps creating an elevated area in the center of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the underpass, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. Massive concrete support pillars line the path while a vibrant purple neon sign on the left wall adds cyberpunk atmosphere. The camera passes a raised concrete platform in the center of the walkway as it continues through the shadowy corridor.

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered walkway into a sunlit open plaza with buildings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright exit of the underpass where sunlight and open urban space become visible ahead

entered.detail: bright opening at the end of the underpass leading to a sunlit open plaza area
tall modern buildings with glass facades visible through the exit ahead
palm trees visible in the distance beyond the exit, returning to the open environment

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the underpass exit, where bright sunlight streams in from the open plaza ahead. The concrete overhead structure begins to end as modern buildings and palm trees become visible in the distance. The camera moves toward the transition from the sheltered corridor back to the open urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit waterfront promenade into a shadowed urban underpass before emerging back into the open city. It begins by walking along a concrete path bordered by sea barriers and a glass office building, passing a pedestrian amidst the golden-hour haze and distant palm trees. As the camera turns left, the scene transitions from the open waterfront into a sheltered corridor where sunlight filters through the overhead structure to create striped shadow patterns across the floor and parked cars. The environment then becomes darker and more enclosed, shifting past massive concrete pillars and a vibrant purple neon sign before crossing a raised central platform. Finally, the camera moves toward the end of the underpass as bright sunlight streams in from an open plaza, revealing modern buildings and palm trees in the distance.
